gates.name: final_validation
gates.description: Pick the best validation checkpoint across the whole trajectory.

gates.name: late_special_unconstrained
gates.description: Pick the best special checkpoint in the late window without any guard.

gates.name: late_special_validation_guard_1p25
gates.description: Late-window special gate with a 1.25x validation guard relative to the experiment's best validation.

gates.name: late_special_event_priority
gates.description: Late-window special gate with validation guard 1.25x and strong e_evt floor 1.0.

gates.name: late_special_dual_control_relaxed
gates.description: Late-window special gate with relaxed 1.5x validation guard plus dual-control floors z_art>=0.3 and e_evt>=0.5.

gates.name: late_special_strict_positive_control
gates.description: Late-window special gate with 1.25x validation guard and positive-control floors z_art>=0.1 and e_evt>=0.5.

notes: This report replays several interpretable checkpoint-gate prototypes over the late-window checkpoints.
Each gate either optimizes validation, optimizes special behavior, or constrains dual-control behavior before selecting the best special checkpoint.
anchor_final_checkpoint is the strongest final checkpoint among the compared experiments and is used as the current default reference.
